(B) Ana finished second-to-last

(E) Dan finished second-to-last
(F) Joe finished second-to-last

Since Amy finished below Rob, and the spaces available are 1st and 5th/6th, Amy must be 5th. This leads to Eli finishing 6th.

So the order is: Joe Amy Ada Ana Eli Rob Dan.

Now let's look at the options regarding who finished second-to-last:

Second to last is Eli.

Therefore, the correct answer is **(G) Eli finished second-to-last**.
